detail.title: Software Engineer Specialist-Integration

description_sections.text: 1 skill or credential matches your profile
Your Role with Us|To Turanga ki a Matou
Visited employer's application site on 24 Jun 2026
1 skill or credential matches your profle
Your Role with Us |To Turanga ki a Matou
As a Software Engineer Specialist - Integration in our Technology team, you'llplay a key
role in designing and delivering integration solutions that keep our systems connected,
secure,and running smoothly.You'll collaborate with architects,engineers,and business
stakeholders tobuild robust,scalable platforms that support both strategic initiatives and
day-to-dayoperations.This is an exciting opportunityto grow yourtechnical expertise,
strengthen your influence across teams, and contribute to continuous improvement as
you help shape reliable,future-ready integration capabilities.
·Design and deliverintegration solutions that enable reliable,secure connectivity and
support business outcomes across the organisation.
·Develop and enhance integration components that meet quality standards,improving
·Design and deliverintegration solutions that enablereliable,secure connectivity and
·Resolveincidents and strengthen reliability,contributing toimproved system stability
·Collaborate with stakeholders to clarify requirements and deliversolutions that align
·Youbring strong experience in integration orC#.NETdevelopment,with the abilityto
·You have arelevant tertiaryqualification in IT,ComputerScience,orarelated discipline
·You communicate clearly and build effectiverelationships,enabling collaboration with
·You apply analytical thinking and sound judgement,balancing quality, risk, and
delivery outcomes to solve problems effectively.
·You take ownership and contribute to team success,managing priorities while
·You may also have relevant professional certifications, ora desire to continue
Your Life at AIA| To Ao ki AIA
At AlA,yourexperience matters, and so does yourimpact.In return foryourexpertise,we
offer a career where you can apply your skills to meaningful work that improves lives
across Asia-Pacific.You*llenjoy flexible ways of working,competitive rewards, and access
to continuous learning programs designed to keep you ahead in a rapidly changing world.
Our collaborative culture values your ideas and empowers you to innovate,solve complex
challenges, and contribute to ourambition of helping a bilion people live Healthier,
AlA Group is one of the largest life insurers in the world, with a presence in 18
markets across Asia Pacific. AlA New Zealand Limited is part of the AlA Group and
has been providing insurance to New Zealanders since 1981..
Don't provide your bank or credit card details when applying for jobs.
